title: cryptogramma brunoniana
intro: Cryptogramma brunoniana, also known as the Rock fern or Western rock fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Cryptogramma brunoniana lie in its ability to act as an astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic agent, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Cryptogramma brunoniana can be made by infusing the plant in hot water to create a tea, or by using it in tincture form, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
